files.patch:
@@ -61,1 +61,4 @@
-        List<Method> methods = Stream.of(cls.getDeclaredMethods())
+        List<Method> methods = Stream.concat(
+                    Stream.of(cls.getDeclaredMethods()), // prefer "local" methods
+                    Stream.of(cls.getMethods()) // include public inherited methods
+                )
@@ -63,0 +66,1 @@
+                .distinct()

@@ -38,1 +38,1 @@
-	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: failed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 1; failed: 6' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
@@ -57,1 +57,1 @@
-	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 5' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 7' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
@@ -70,1 +70,1 @@
-	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 5' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 7' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
